title: Street Fighter II: The World Warrior Gameplay Map

subject.name: Street Fighter II: The World Warrior

narrative.description: Capcom's arcade fighting revolution established the six-button fighter template with distinct global roster characters, fireball zoning, and combo discovery that defined competitive fighting games.
narrative.core_loop: Win two-of-three rounds by depleting opponent health using normals, specials, and super meter reads in head-to-head matches.

mechanics.map_notes: Two rounds to win; health bars deplete to zero for round victory.
mechanics.expression: Two rounds to win; health bars deplete to zero for round victory.

mechanics.map_notes: Quarter-circle and charge motions execute Hadoken, Shoryuken, and unique specials.
mechanics.expression: Quarter-circle and charge motions execute Hadoken, Shoryuken, and unique specials.

mechanics.map_notes: Link and cancel systems enable multi-hit punish and pressure sequences.
mechanics.expression: Link and cancel systems enable multi-hit punish and pressure sequences.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump-ins and sweeps telegraph via startup animation frames.
mechanics.expression: Jump-ins and sweeps telegraph via startup animation frames.

mechanics.map_notes: Super Combo gauge fills from dealing and taking damage.
mechanics.expression: Super Combo gauge fills from dealing and taking damage.

mechanics.map_notes: CPU opponents follow difficulty-scaled pattern loops.
mechanics.expression: CPU opponents follow difficulty-scaled pattern loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Recovery frames on whiffed moves create punish windows.
mechanics.expression: Recovery frames on whiffed moves create punish windows.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes from blocked and unblocked hits.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes from blocked and unblocked hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Continue credits restart the tournament bracket.
mechanics.expression: Continue credits restart the tournament bracket.

mechanics.map_notes: Multiple characters and mirror matches extend competitive depth.
mechanics.expression: Multiple characters and mirror matches extend competitive depth.

mechanics.map_notes: Normals and throws form the neutral game foundation.
mechanics.expression: Normals and throws form the neutral game foundation.

mechanics.map_notes: Final four boss gauntlet chains consecutive fights.
mechanics.expression: Final four boss gauntlet chains consecutive fights.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Street Fighter II: The World Warrior through its core fighting loop.
